title: That's Just Peachy!
description: Adds peaches and peach-based recipes into Minecraft!
body:
## That's Just Peachy!

A small mod based around YouTuber Just Peachy, which adds peach recipes and a new peach tree type.
Peach trees spawn in hot biomes, such as the Savanna and Jungle!

Suggested: JEI (For recipes!)

 

Available Versions: 1.18.2, 1.19.2, 1.20.1

 

**Extra Credits:**
RileyCasper - Vanilla Peach Door Variants (1.5, 1.6)

junshengxie - Chinese Translations (1.4)

Arkboy_tekrex - Austrian & German Translations (1.4)

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/oxzCr5w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1122)
